args.code: (() => { try { const g = game; return JSON.stringify({day: g.day, season: g.season, time: g.time, money: g.money, stamina: g.stamina, maxStamina: g.maxStamina, health: g.health, maxHealth: g.maxHealth, fields: g.fields.length, fieldDetails: g.fields.map(f => ({id: f.id, crop: f.crop, stage: f.stage, growProgress: f.growProgress})), eventsToday: typeof g.eventsToday !== 'undefined' ? g.eventsToday : 0, eventHistoryCount: g.eventHistory ? g.eventHistory.length : 0, skills: g.skills, npcs: g.npcs, dailyActions: g.dailyActions, crops: g.crops, seeds: g.seeds, mode: g.mode, weather: g.weather, stats: g.stats, reputation: g.reputation, mood: g.mood, house: g.house, storageCapacity: g.storageCapacity, composting: g.composting, hiredWorker: g.hiredWorker ? true : false, justStarted: g.justStarted, currentEvent: g.currentEvent, items: g.items, buildings: g.buildings, processedItems: g.processedItems, quests: g.quests, tutorialStep: g.tutorialStep}); } catch(e) { return JSON.stringify({error: e.message, stack: e.stack}); } })()
